info.title: Dairo API
info.summary: Email infrastructure API for AI agents and applications.
info.description: Source-of-truth public Dairo API contract. Operations marked x-dairo-status=live are implemented; planned operations define the SDK/CLI target surface.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Custom sending/receiving domains and DNS verification.

tags.name: Email Lists
tags.description: Reusable recipient lists and list sends.

tags.name: Outbound
tags.description: Outbound email history and delivery events.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Reusable React email templates with immutable versions.

tags.name: Budgets
tags.description: Fail-closed spend & send budgets enforced inside the send path.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: The durable, replayable event ledger (reliability spine).

tags.name: A2A Mail
tags.description: Internal Dairo-to-Dairo email transport: when every recipient is a Dairo-managed inbox, sends skip SES and are delivered directly with re-verifiable agent provenance.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent Passport: verified, portable agent identity and provenance.

tags.name: Compliance
tags.description: EU Sovereignty Suite: tamper-evident audit export, erasure with signed deletion certificates, and machine-checkable residency.

tags.name: Conversation Autopilot
tags.description: Durable await_verification waits: watch an inbox for an OTP/code and resolve via event/poll.

tags.name: Buckets
tags.description: Storage buckets for arbitrary object uploads.

get.summary: Machine-checkable residency assertion.
get.description: Returns the data-residency posture (primary region, no-US-egress assertion, enforcement summary) and the org-wide subprocessor list with a monotonic version a buyer's compliance automation can assert on in CI. Requires the mail:read scope.

get.summary: List agent passports.
get.description: Returns the account's agent passports (verified, portable agent identities). Requires the mail:read scope.

post.summary: Create an agent passport.
post.description: Creates a durable, portable agent passport with a stable agentId (agt_...) used in provenance headers and verify(). Binding identity is a credential-control action, so it requires the keys:write scope.

get.summary: Agent Passport JWKS (public).
get.description: Public JWKS of the Agent Passport Ed25519 signing key(s) (OKP / Ed25519). Third-party verifiers use this to check provenance signatures. Also served at /.well-known/dairo-jwks.json. Unauthenticated and cacheable.

get.summary: List per-agent reputation (fleet view).
get.description: Returns the rolling bounce/complaint reputation and circuit-breaker state for every one of your agents that has been evaluated. Each agent carries its own reputation, isolated from the domain and from sibling agents; an agent whose bounce/complaint rate climbs is throttled and then quarantined before the SES cliff. Requires the mail:read scope.

get.summary: Verify mail provenance (public).
get.description: Public, unauthenticated verification endpoint. Returns a yes/no verdict plus the resolved agent for a provenance-signed Dairo message. Call with ?id=<rfcMessageId> to attest from Dairo's own record, or with the reconstructed canonical fields (?agent=&kid=&from=&to=&subject=&ts=&sig=) to verify a signature against the kid's public key. Always answers HTTP 200 with a verdict (it is a verification result, not a request error).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: RFC message id of a Dairo-sent message (the by-message verify path).

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Portable agentId (agt_...) from the provenance header.

parameters.name: kid
parameters.description: Key id from the provenance header.

parameters.name: sig
parameters.description: base64url Ed25519 signature from the provenance header.

get.summary: Get an agent passport.
get.description: Reads one of the account's agent passports by its UUID or portable agentId (agt_...). Requires the mail:read scope.

post.summary: Bind an API key or inbox to an agent.
post.description: Binds an API key and/or inbox you own to this agent passport, so sends authenticated by that key (or from that inbox) are attributed to the agent and provenance-signed. Requires the keys:write scope.

get.summary: Get one agent's reputation and should-send verdict.
get.description: Returns this agent's rolling bounce/complaint rates over the reputation window, its circuit-breaker state, the active thresholds, and a shouldSend boolean (false when the agent is quarantined). Poll this before a batch to decide whether to send. Requires the mail:read scope.

delete.summary: Clear an agent's reputation state (operator override).
delete.description: Operator override for an agent's circuit-breaker: clears a quarantine or resolves a review back to healthy (the default), or pins a chosen state. Set overrideLocked to stop the breaker from auto-tripping the agent again until you clear the lock. Use this once the underlying cause of the elevated bounce/complaint rate is fixed. Requires the mail:send scope.

get.summary: List API keys.

post.summary: Create an API key and return its one-time secret.
post.description: When called with an existing API key, requested scopes must be a subset of the caller key's scopes. Allowed but escalating scopes return 403.

patch.summary: Update an API key's name and/or IP allowlist.

get.summary: Get attachment metadata.
Download an attachment directly via an authenticated redirect.
Create a short-lived signed download URL for an attachment.

parameters.name: expiryHours
parameters.description: Signed URL expiry in hours. Defaults to about 5 minutes when omitted. Maximum is 168 hours / one week.

get.summary: List audit log events.
get.description: Returns a paginated, reverse-chronological stream of governance-relevant actions (resource creation, deletion, key management, and similar). Page with limit and cursor. Requires the mail:read scope.

get.summary: Export the tamper-evident hash-chained audit ledger.
get.description: Returns the caller's own audit-log rows in ascending chainSeq order, each carrying prevHash/rowHash, plus an Ed25519-signed manifest committing to the chain head. An auditor verifies the manifest against JWKS and independently re-derives every rowHash from the rows to detect any insert/delete/edit — no server trust required. Optionally bounded by an RFC3339 from/to window; an over-wide window is rejected so the export always matches the chain head. Requires the mail:read scope.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Lower bound (inclusive) RFC3339 timestamp on created_at.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Upper bound (inclusive) RFC3339 timestamp on created_at.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Reserved; only the JSON form is emitted in V1 (NDJSON streaming is a fast-follow).

get.summary: List spend & send budgets.
get.description: Returns every budget you have set (account, key, or agent scope) with its configured limits and live windowed usage (sends in the last 24h, new recipients in the last hour, and whether the account has any recorded complaint). Each budget is a fail-closed, server-side ceiling enforced inside the send path. Requires the mail:read scope.

put.description: Idempotently sets (upserts) a fail-closed budget for an account, key, or agent scope. Volume limits (maxSendsPerDay, maxNewRecipientsPerHour) and a hardStopOnComplaint flip are enforced inside the send path before a message is enqueued and re-checked at scheduled fire time; over the line, a send is rejected with a budget_exceeded error and a budget.tripped event is emitted. The reserved maxSpendPerDayCents money cap is accepted but not yet enforced (V2). Setting a cap is a privileged control-plane action, so it requires the keys:write scope (a mail:send-only key cannot raise its own ceiling). In V1, scope=agent is an alias for scope=key keyed on the api_key id until Agent Passport ships.

get.summary: Get a single budget by scope.
get.description: Returns a single budget plus its live usage. Use 'account' for the account-scope budget, or a key/agent scopeId for a key/agent budget. Requires the mail:read scope.

delete.summary: Delete a budget for a scope.

get.summary: List dedicated IP pools and their warmup status.
get.description: Returns the managed dedicated sending IP pools provisioned for your account, each with live managed-warmup status. Dedicated IPs are an enterprise feature; accounts without any provisioned pools receive an empty list. Requires the mail:read scope.

get.summary: List domains for the authenticated account.

post.summary: Create or return a domain and required DNS records.

delete.summary: Delete a domain owned by the authenticated account.

post.summary: Recheck SES/DNS status for a domain.
Enqueue an erasure job (typed: subject erasure or inbox purge).
post.description: Enqueues a durable, idempotent erasure job that deletes every message/thread/attachment (rows + raw S3 objects) referencing the subject email under the caller's account, then signs an Ed25519 deletion certificate enumerating exactly what was destroyed. Returns 202 with a jobId; poll GET /v1/compliance/erasure-jobs/{id} for the certificate. Supply idempotencyKey to make retries return the same job. Erasure is destructive and irreversible, so it requires the keys:write scope.

get.summary: List erasure jobs.
Get an erasure job + its signed deletion certificate.
get.description: Returns the status and tallies of an erasure job; once completed, the response includes the Ed25519-signed deletion certificate and its signature. Requires the mail:read scope.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The erasure job id returned by erase/purge-inbox.

get.summary: Read the durable event ledger (catch-up).
get.description: Returns the account's durable, ordered event stream (outbound, SES status, and inbound events) forward from an optional cursor, with per-partition gap detection. No re-delivery. Requires the mail:read scope.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor (from a prior pagination.nextCursor) to read forward from.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter to one event type, e.g. email.bounced.

parameters.name: idempotencyKey
parameters.description: Return every event carrying this loop-wide idempotency key.

post.summary: Replay events from the ledger to webhooks.
post.description: Re-reads a ledger slice and re-delivers it to the account's webhook subscriptions, reconstructing byte-identical events (same event id, so consumer-side dedupe is exact). Each replayed POST carries X-Dairo-Replay: true. At-least-once, ordered by (partitionKey, seq). Requires the webhooks:write scope.

get.summary: List inboxes for the authenticated account.

post.summary: Create or return an inbox on a verified account domain.

delete.summary: Delete an inbox by ID or address.

patch.summary: Update an inbox's agent and/or routing mode.

get.summary: Get the JSON-Schema-lite extraction contract attached to an inbox.

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

put.summary: Attach or replace the extraction contract on an inbox (upsert).

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

delete.summary: Detach the extraction contract from an inbox (revert to passthrough).

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

post.summary: Register a durable await_verification wait on an inbox.
post.description: Open a durable wait that watches the inbox's inbound mail for an OTP/code/confirmation, extracted by regex/pattern (V1). Returns immediately with a waitId and status 'pending'; the outcome arrives as a verification.resolved / verification.expired event on your webhook and the durable event ledger, or by polling the wait. Idempotent on idempotencyKey.

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

get.summary: List recent verification waits for an inbox.

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

get.summary: Poll a single verification wait.

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

parameters.name: waitId
parameters.description: Verification wait id returned by the register call.

delete.description: Cancels a pending wait (it transitions to expired). Returns 409 if the wait is already resolved or expired.

parameters.name: inbox
parameters.description: Inbox UUID or full address (e.g. agent@dairo.app).

parameters.name: waitId
parameters.description: Verification wait id returned by the register call.

get.summary: List email lists.

post.summary: Create an email list.

get.summary: Get an email list and active members.

post.summary: Add or update email-list members.
Send an email to an email list with SES-safe batching.

get.summary: List messages across inboxes or for one inbox.

post.summary: Send an email from a Dairo inbox.

get.summary: Get one message by ID.
List templates.

post.summary: Create a template and publish version 1.

get.summary: Get a template and one version (default current).

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Return this version instead of the current published version.

get.summary: List a template's versions.

post.summary: Publish a new immutable template version.

get.summary: Get one template version including source.
List email threads.
Get one thread with its messages.
List webhook subscriptions.
get.description: Returns owner-scoped webhook subscriptions without signing secret hashes.

post.summary: Create a webhook subscription.
post.description: Creates an active webhook. Dairo delivers matching events with JSON POST requests and headers X-Dairo-Event, X-Dairo-Event-Id, X-Dairo-Timestamp, and X-Dairo-Signature. X-Dairo-Signature is v1=<hex HMAC-SHA256> over the raw JSON request body using sha256(secret) as the HMAC key; the one-time secret is returned only by this response.

patch.summary: Update a webhook's url and/or events.

get.summary: Show the authenticated account, API key scopes, plan, usage, and storage remaining.
Create a branded, shareable Dairo download link for an attachment.
get.description: Returns a short-lived branded download URL plus a human share-page URL for the attachment, signed by Dairo's file-link service. Same response shape as the /url endpoint; the link variant always uses the branded Dairo file-link host. Requires the mail:read scope.

parameters.name: expiryHours
parameters.description: Signed link expiry in hours. Defaults to about 5 minutes when omitted. Maximum is 168 hours / one week.

get.summary: Machine-readable MCP tool catalog (public).
get.description: Public, CDN-cacheable catalog of the Dairo MCP tool surface, built from the in-memory tool registry. Carries a strong ETag equal to the content-hash catalogVersion and honors If-None-Match (returns 304 Not Modified with no body). Unauthenticated. Pass ?for=me with a bearer API key to annotate each tool with an allowed flag derived from the key's scopes; ?for=me responses are private and vary on Authorization.

304.description: Not Modified (If-None-Match matched the current catalog version).

parameters.name: for
parameters.description: Set to 'me' with a bearer API key to annotate each tool with an 'allowed' flag computed from the key's scopes.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request header. When it matches the current catalog ETag, the server returns 304 Not Modified.

get.summary: List the caller's A2A (agent-to-agent) hop receipts.
get.description: Keyset-paginated, forward-ordered list of the cross-tenant A2A hops the caller was party to, from either end of the delivery (sender or recipient view). Also reachable via GET /v1/messages?channel=a2a. Requires the mail:read scope.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque forward keyset cursor from a previous page's pagination.nextCursor. Also accepted as 'since'.

parameters.name: inboxId
parameters.description: Restrict to hops where this inbox is either the sender or recipient inbox of the hop.

get.summary: Get one A2A (agent-to-agent) hop receipt by ID.
get.description: Returns a single cross-tenant A2A hop receipt, including provenance and delivery status, from the caller's end of the hop. Also reachable via GET /v1/messages/{messageId} when the id is an A2A hop. Requires the mail:read scope.

get.summary: List physical-mail letters (paginated).

post.summary: Create (and queue) a physical-mail letter.
Price a physical-mail letter without creating it.

get.summary: Get one letter with its delivery-event timeline.

post.summary: Cancel a letter that has not yet been dispatched.

get.summary: List a letter's delivery events.
List storage buckets (lazily seeds the default bucket).

post.summary: Create a named storage bucket.

get.summary: Retrieve a single storage bucket.

patch.summary: Update a bucket's displayName, description, or metadata.

delete.summary: Archive a bucket (and soft-delete its objects). The default bucket cannot be deleted.

get.summary: List objects in a bucket (keyset-paginated).

post.summary: Initiate an object upload (returns a presigned S3 PUT URL).
Finalize an upload: verify true bytes, enforce storage limit, and record the object.

get.summary: Get a presigned S3 GET URL for downloading an object.

delete.summary: Soft-delete a bucket object (best-effort S3 delete).

post.summary: Bulk-delete many objects from one bucket in a single call.
post.description: Soft-delete up to 1000 objects from one bucket in ONE call (so their bytes stop counting) and remove the stored bytes in a single batched S3 delete. Ownership is enforced per id. Partial-success: one bad/foreign/unknown id is reported in `failed` and never fails the whole call.

post.summary: Bulk-delete many mailbox messages in a single call.
post.description: Owner-scoped bulk delete of up to 1000 messages in ONE call. Removes the message rows and their stored bytes (raw email + attachments). Partial-success: one bad/foreign/unknown id is reported in `failed` and never fails the whole call.

post.summary: Cancel a scheduled outbound email.
post.description: Cancels a scheduled outbound email before it fires, by emailId. Only works while the email is still status scheduled; returns 409 if it has already been sent, queued, or canceled. Requires the mail:send scope.

get.summary: List outbound delivery events, bounces, and complaints.

bearerAuth.description: Dairo API key, e.g. dairo_test_... or dairo_live_...

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for safe retries of side-effecting operations.

direction.description: Which end of the cross-tenant hop the caller is reading: 'sent' (caller is the sender) or 'received' (caller is the recipient).

agentId.description: The sending agent passport UUID, when the send was attributed.

recipientMessageId.description: The delivered inbound message id in the recipient's inbox.

provenance.description: The signed X-Dairo-Provenance header value the recipient can re-verify via /v1/verify. Null when the hop was delivered unsigned.

AgentBindRequest.description: Provide an apiKeyId and/or inboxId to bind to this agent.

AgentReputation.description: An agent's rolling reputation and circuit-breaker state.

state.description: Circuit-breaker state. healthy sends freely; throttled sends under a reduced per-agent rate; quarantined is fail-closed (no send) until cleared; review is an operator-pinned hold.

shouldSend.description: false only when the agent is quarantined. Poll before a batch.

AgentReputationClearRequest.description: Operator override for an agent's circuit-breaker. Omit the body to clear back to healthy.

state.description: Target state to set. Defaults to healthy (clears a quarantine/review).

overrideLocked.description: Pin the state so the breaker does not auto-trip the agent again until cleared. Defaults to false.

allowedIps.description: The key's IP allowlist (IPv4/IPv6 addresses or CIDR ranges), or null when the key authenticates from any IP.

shareUrl.description: Human branded Dairo share page URL for the attachment.

AuditExportManifest.description: Signed manifest committing to the export window bounds, rowCount, and chain head.

AuditExportResponse.description: A hash-chained audit-ledger export plus its signed verification manifest.

AuditExportRow.description: One hash-chained audit row in an export.

chainSeq.description: 1-based contiguous per-user sequence; a gap means a deleted row.

prevHash.description: hex sha256 of the predecessor rowHash ('' for the genesis row).

action.description: The audited action, e.g. api_key.created, domain.deleted, webhook.created.

resourceType.description: The kind of resource the action targeted, e.g. api_key, domain, inbox, webhook.

resourceId.description: Identifier of the affected resource, when one applies.

actor.description: Who performed the action: an API key id/prefix, a user id, or a system actor.

ip.description: Source IP address the action originated from, when captured.

metadata.description: Free-form, action-specific context captured with the event. Null when no metadata was recorded.

Budget.description: A fail-closed spend/send budget for an account, key, or agent scope.

scopeId.description: null for the account scope; the api_key id for key/agent scopes.

BudgetLimits.description: Budget limits. At least one enforceable limit (maxSendsPerDay, maxNewRecipientsPerHour, or hardStopOnComplaint=true) is required. maxSpendPerDayCents is reserved for V2 and accepted but not yet enforced.

maxSendsPerDay.description: Recipient-denominated sends allowed in a rolling 24h window.

maxNewRecipientsPerHour.description: Recipients addressed in a rolling 1h window. V1 counts every recipient on each send (a conservative over-count); true distinct-recipient dedup is V2.

hardStopOnComplaint.description: When true, every send under this budget fails closed once the account has any recorded complaint.

maxSpendPerDayCents.description: Reserved V2 money cap; accepted but not yet enforced.

scopeId.description: Required for key/agent scopes (an api_key id you own); omit for the account scope.

sendsLast24h.description: Recipient-denominated sends recorded in the last 24h for this scope.

newRecipientsLastHour.description: Recipients addressed in the last hour for this scope.

accountHasComplaint.description: Whether the account has any recorded complaint (drives hardStopOnComplaint).

allowedIps.description: Optional IPv4/IPv6 addresses or CIDR ranges (up to 50) the key may authenticate from. Deny-by-default: a correct secret from an unlisted IP is rejected with 403. Omit or null for any-IP.

secret.description: One-time API key secret. Store immediately.

CreateLetterRequest.description: Exactly one of pdfBase64 or file must be provided.

DedicatedIp.description: A managed dedicated-IP pool. Dairo provisions SES managed dedicated IP pools (AWS owns IP sizing and per-ISP warmup), so dedicated sending is modeled as a pool rather than individual addresses.

poolName.description: The SES managed dedicated IP pool name allocated for your account.

scalingMode.description: The SES dedicated IP pool scaling mode. Dairo uses managed pools.

configSet.description: The SES configuration set the pool is associated with.

createdAt.description: When the dedicated IP pool was provisioned (UTC).

warmup.description: Live warmup status, or null when the live SES/CloudWatch read is unavailable.

DedicatedIpWarmup.description: Live managed-warmup status for the pool, blended from SES per-IP warmup and CloudWatch reputation metrics. The whole object is null when the live read is unavailable.

ipCount.description: Number of dedicated IPs currently allocated to the pool.

warmingIps.description: How many of the pool's IPs are still warming up.

warmedIps.description: How many of the pool's IPs have completed warmup.

warmupPercent.description: Approximate overall warmup progress for the pool, 0-100.

DeletionCertificate.description: A court-usable, Ed25519-signed receipt enumerating exactly what was destroyed.

subjectEmail.description: The data subject's email address to erase across all stored mail.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional caller-supplied key; a retry with the same key returns the same job.

ErasureJobAccepted.description: Acknowledgement that an erasure job was enqueued.

gaps.description: Per-partition seq gaps detected within the returned window.

EventReplayRequest.description: Selects a ledger slice to re-deliver. Provide exactly one lower bound: since (an opaque cursor from GET /v1/events), sinceSeq (+inboxId, replay one partition from a seq), or sinceTimestamp (RFC3339).

since.description: Opaque keyset cursor (from GET /v1/events) to replay forward from.

sinceSeq.description: Replay one partition starting at this seq (inclusive). Requires inboxId.

inboxId.description: Scope the replay to one inbox partition (required with sinceSeq; an optional filter otherwise).

sinceTimestamp.description: Replay events created at or after this RFC3339 timestamp.

until.description: Optional upper bound (events created at or before this RFC3339 timestamp).

webhookId.description: Optional: replay only to this one webhook subscription; otherwise to every matching active subscription.

maxEvents.description: Hard cap on the slice size. A slice that exceeds the cap is rejected with 400 asking the caller to page with until/maxEvents.

replayed.description: Number of events re-delivered to at least one matching subscription.

skipped.description: Number of events in the slice with no matching active subscription.

InboxSchemaContract.description: JSON-Schema-lite extraction contract: a flat map of field name to declaration. Identical shape to a template variables schema. '{}' (or omitted) means no contract (passthrough).

x.description: base64url of the 32-byte Ed25519 public key.

LedgerEvent.description: One durable, ordered row of the reliability-spine event ledger. Mirrors the webhook event for the same source event (same eventId/type/data) and adds the monotonic per-partition seq plus the loop-wide idempotencyKey.

eventId.description: The evt_<uuid> id; identical to the X-Dairo-Event-Id of the original webhook delivery, so consumer-side dedupe is exact across live delivery and replay.

type.description: Event type, e.g. email.sent, email.delivered, email.bounced, email.complained, message.received.

seq.description: Monotonic, 1-based, contiguous sequence number within the partition. A gap in seq is a lost event (surfaced in gaps[]).

partitionKey.description: The ordering domain for seq, e.g. inbox:<uuid>.

idempotencyKey.description: Loop-wide idempotency key threaded from the originating send onto every status event and the matched inbound reply. Null when the event did not originate from an idempotent send.

data.description: The original webhook event data payload (metadata-first, body-free).

partitionKey.description: The partition (ordering domain) the gap was detected in, e.g. inbox:<uuid>.

missingSeq.description: Sequence numbers expected-but-absent within the returned window for this partition. A non-empty list means one or more events were lost; replay to recover.

LetterPriceRequest.description: Provide either pageCount or pdfBase64 to price a letter.

structured.description: Schema-Inbox extraction result for this message: the extracted object (validated data, or the raw candidate on passthrough/quarantine). Null when no schema was configured or extraction did not run.

extractionStatus.description: Outcome of the Schema-Inbox extraction stage for this message. Null when extraction did not run.

scheduledAt.description: When the email is scheduled to send, for status scheduled. Null for immediate sends.

canceledAt.description: When a scheduled email was canceled, for status canceled. Null otherwise.

type.description: SES event type, e.g. Delivery, Bounce, Complaint.

OutboundWebhookEventData.description: Metadata-only outbound webhook payload data. emailId is the Dairo join key; recipient identifies the affected address; providerMessageId is the SES/AWS correlation ID. Body, HTML, raw MIME, and attachment content are never included.

idempotencyKey.description: Loop-wide idempotency key threaded from the originating send (reliability spine). Null when the send carried no key.

inboxId.description: The inbox to purge of all stored mail (must be owned by the caller).

idempotencyKey.description: Optional caller-supplied key; a retry with the same key returns the same job.

source.description: React Email TSX/JSX component source. Rendered asynchronously by Dairo in an isolated renderer with allowlisted React Email imports.

props.description: JSON props passed to the default exported email component. Serialized size limit: 32 KiB.

timeoutSec.description: How long the wait stays open, 30..=1800 seconds. expiresAt = now + timeoutSec.

fromHint.description: Optional case-insensitive substring matched against the inbound From address (e.g. 'github.com'). Null/absent matches any sender.

pattern.description: Optional custom regex with EXACTLY one capture group (the code). Compiled and validated at registration. Absent uses the built-in OTP pattern set.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key; a retried register with the same key returns the same wait.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded attachment bytes. Dairo inline attachment delivery is capped at 8 MiB decoded total to stay below API Gateway JSON/base64 envelope limits and SES v2 40 MB message limits.

delivery.description: Explicit delivery mode. 'attachment' sends inline as a normal email attachment. 'auto' sends inline only when safely below inline limits; otherwise callers should use an explicit share-link flow. 'link' never mutates the email body automatically and this send endpoint does not create standalone file links; create/get a Dairo share link first and place it in text/html yourself.

idempotencyKey.description: Body-level idempotency key kept for current API compatibility. Prefer Idempotency-Key header for new clients.

attachments.description: Outbound send attachments. 'attachment' and safe 'auto' sends are inline; current inline API limit is 10 files, 8 MiB per file, 8 MiB total decoded bytes. 'link' is explicit and must be backed by a pre-created Dairo share link placed deliberately in text/html by the caller.

sendAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp WITH an explicit timezone offset to schedule the send for a future time (max 30 days ahead). Omit to send immediately. A scheduled email starts with status scheduled and can be stopped via POST /v1/outbound-emails/{emailId}/cancel before it fires.

status.description: queued when accepted for async processing; sent/failed after worker processing.

error.description: Public-safe failure code/message. Provider/internal text is stored internally and never returned to API clients.

warnings.description: Warning-only delivery guidance. Complaint suppressions do not block sending; agents should surface these warnings before further contact.

deliveryChannel.description: The transport used. 'a2a' marks an internal Dairo-to-Dairo delivery (A2A Mail) that skipped SES; 'smtp' (or absent) is the normal SES path.

a2a.description: True when every recipient was a Dairo-managed inbox and the send was delivered internally via A2A Mail (status 'sent', providerMessageId 'a2a_...').

SendEmailTemplateRef.description: Send by referencing a stored template instead of an inline body. Mutually exclusive with text, html, and react: combining a template with any inline body is a 400. The referenced version is resolved and pinned at request time; supplied variables are validated against that version's variable schema (a bad variable is a synchronous 400). When the version declares a subject template it is used unless an explicit subject is provided on the request.

id.description: Template UUID or slug, owned by the authenticated account.

version.description: Explicit version to pin. Omit to resolve and pin the template's current default version at request time. An archived template can only be sent with an explicit version.

variables.description: Values for the template's declared variables. Validated against the pinned version's variable schema (type, enum, maxLength, url/email format, required, defaults). Serialized size limit: 32 KiB.

message.example: Recipient previously complained; do not contact again unless you are sure.

sourceEmailId.description: Dairo emailId that originally produced the complaint warning, when known.

providerMessageId.description: Provider correlation ID for the complaint event, when known.

onValidationError.description: Behaviour when an extracted object fails validation. 'quarantine' (default) holds the message out of message.received and emits message.quarantined; 'passthrough' delivers it with the error attached.

extractionHint.description: Optional free-text hint passed to the extractor as prompt context. Never executed.

SignedArtifact.description: A JSON object signed with the org Ed25519 key. The signature commits to the canonical form of every field except alg/kid/signature; a verifier reconstructs those bytes and checks the signature with the public key from JWKS.

alg.description: EdDSA, or null when no signing key is configured.

kid.description: Key id whose public half is published in JWKS.

signature.description: base64url (no-pad) Ed25519 signature, or null when unsigned.

source.description: React Email TSX source for version 1.

TemplateVariableSchema.description: JSON-Schema-lite variable contract: a flat map of variable name to declaration.

source.description: React Email TSX source for the new version.

promote.description: Advance currentVersion to this version. Defaults to true.

VerificationExpiredEventData.description: Data payload of the verification.expired event (emitted by the expiry sweeper on the webhook + durable event ledger when a wait passes its deadline without a match).

VerificationResolvedEventData.description: Data payload of the verification.resolved event (emitted on the webhook + durable event ledger when an open wait matches an inbound message). Metadata-first: the messageId + from let the agent fetch/verify; the email body is never inlined.

from.description: From address of the resolving message.

VerificationWait.description: A durable await_verification wait. status is pending until it resolves (a code was extracted from an inbound message) or expires (deadline passed / canceled). Resolution outputs (code, from, messageId, resolvedAt) are present only once resolved.

agentId.description: The Agent Passport that registered this wait, when the API key was agent-bound.

code.description: The extracted verification code (present once resolved).

from.description: The From address of the message that resolved the wait.

messageId.description: The inbound message that resolved the wait.

reason.description: Set when verified=false (unknown_kid, bad_signature, unknown_agent, passport_revoked, message_not_found, ...).

lastDeliveryAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful webhook delivery, or null before the first successful delivery.

expectedBytes.description: Optional client-declared size; the true size is verified on finalize.

headers.description: Headers that MUST be sent with the PUT (e.g. SSE headers).

objectIds.description: The storage object ids to delete (1-1000).

deleted.description: The ids that were successfully deleted.

id.description: The id that could not be deleted.

error.description: Why this id was skipped (e.g. not found / not owned).

failed.description: Per-id failures; never aborts the rest of the batch.
